action: Reflexion-style warm-restart for expensive stalled phases — build/audit/scout get context, others cold
operator_note: BLOCKED-BY: c34 ships first (needs RETRY-WITH-FALLBACK signal). Scope (4 files, ~120 LoC): (1) scripts/dispatch/phase-watchdog.sh MODIFY — move stalled artifact aside atomically: mv {role}-report.md → {role}-report.md.stalled.<ts> + write .evolve/runs/cycle-N/stall-progress.json sidecar (Temporal HeartbeatPayload pattern). (2) scripts/dispatch/resume-cycle.sh +25 LoC build EVOLVE_WARM_RESTART_HINT env from stalled artifact + sidecar when checkpoint.reason=stall-inactivity AND restart-policy.json[phase]==warm. (3) scripts/dispatch/subagent-run.sh +15 LoC accept EVOLVE_WARM_RESTART_HINT, prepend to phase prompt: 'Previous attempt of phase X stalled at <ts> after N bytes. Last coherent artifact: <path>. Continue from there; do not redo completed work.' (4) .evolve/restart-policy.json NEW per-phase warm/cold map: scout=warm, build=warm, audit=warm; others=cold (operator-overrideable via EVOLVE_RESTART_MODE_<PHASE>). (5) scripts/tests/warm-restart-prompt-test.sh NEW ~40 LoC. Empirical justification: Shinn et al. 2023 NeurIPS Reflexion paper showed ~20% improvement on AlfWorld/HotPotQA with verbal-reflection retry vs cold; Anthropic multi-agent research system uses warm restart explicitly. Cost impact: ~$0.30 warm vs ~$1.50 cold for Builder phase.
